badge.copyCode: Copy the code below and paste it into your website footer:

about.metaDescription: Free open-source game development tools directory — discover the best tools across the entire game dev pipeline.
about.title: About MossGame
about.subtitle: Your Game Dev Toolkit Starts Here
about.intro: MossGame is a free, open-source directory dedicated to helping game developers discover the best tools across every stage of game creation.
about.mission: Making games is hard enough — finding the right tools shouldn't be. From game engines and art creation to audio production, AI assistance, and publishing — we curate high-quality tools for indie developers, professional studios, and hobbyists alike.
about.mission2: Every tool is hand-picked and categorized across the full development pipeline. We're building the most comprehensive game development resource hub on the web — 100% free, 100% community-driven.
about.forUsersDesc: Find the right tools for every stage of development
about.discoverGemsDesc: From prototyping to publishing — tools for concept, art, code, audio, testing, localization, and more.
about.saveTimeDesc: Skip the endless searching. We've organized the best game dev tools by category so you can focus on creating.
about.realReviewsDesc: Each tool listing includes AI-generated features, use cases, and FAQs to help you make informed decisions.
about.forDevelopersDesc: Get your game dev tool in front of the right audience
about.freePromotionDesc: Submit your game engine, art tool, asset pack, or plugin — completely free, no hidden costs.
about.gainExposureDesc: Reach game developers who are actively searching for tools like yours. Featured listings get priority placement.
about.communityFeedbackDesc: Open source and community-curated. The best tools rise to the top through real-world usage and feedback.
about.joinCommunityDesc: Whether you're building the next indie hit or creating tools for fellow developers — you've found your home.

pricing.metaDescription: Submit your product and get dofollow backlinks at no cost.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.freeSubmissionDesc: Submit your SaaS and get discovered
pricing.freeListingDesc: Submit your product at no cost — no credit card required
pricing.dofollowBacklinksDesc: Get valuable SEO juice — just add our badge to your site
pricing.featuredPlacementDesc: Badge holders get priority in search results
pricing.instantApprovalDesc: Get listed within 24 hours of submission
pricing.trafficAnalyticsDesc: Track clicks and engagement from our platform
pricing.categoryPlacementDesc: Choose the perfect category for your product
pricing.noCatch: No catch. No hidden fees. Just free promotion.
pricing.faqA1: Yes! Our platform will always be free for product submissions.
pricing.faqQ2: Do I have to add the badge?
pricing.faqA2: The badge is optional, but it's the only way to get a dofollow backlink.
pricing.faqQ3: What if I remove the badge later?
pricing.faqA3: Your link will revert to nofollow. We verify badges regularly.
pricing.readyDesc: Join hundreds of products getting discovered on our platform

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.translationNotice: English version is the authoritative text. Translations are for reference only.
terms.s1text: By accessing and using MossGame ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.s2text: Permission is granted to temporarily access and use the Service for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
terms.s2li2: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
terms.s2li3: Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on the Service
terms.s2li4: Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
terms.s2li5: Transfer the materials to another person or "mirror" the materials on any other server
terms.s3text: MossGame is an open source project, originally based on HiCyou. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the source code for personal and commercial purposes under the following conditions:
terms.s3li1: You must display the "Powered by" badge on your website in a visible location, typically in the footer or about page.
terms.s3li2: The badge must link back to our official website.
terms.s3li3: The attribution badge may not be removed, obscured, or made invisible.
terms.s3li4: You may modify the source code to fit your needs.
terms.s3warning: Failure to comply with the attribution requirement will result in violation of these terms and may result in legal action.
terms.s4text: By submitting content to us, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, and display the submitted content. You represent that:
terms.s4li1: You own or have the necessary rights to the content you submit
terms.s4li2: The content does not violate any third-party rights
terms.s4li3: The content is accurate and not misleading
terms.s4li4: The content does not contain malicious code or links
terms.s5text: We offer dofollow links to submitted websites that meet our quality standards and display our attribution badge. We reserve the right to:
terms.s5li1: Convert dofollow links to nofollow at our discretion
terms.s5li2: Remove submissions that violate our policies
terms.s5li3: Change link attributes based on badge verification
terms.s6text: You may not submit or link to content that:
terms.s6li1: Is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, or harassing
terms.s6li2: Contains malware, viruses, or other harmful code
terms.s6li3: Promotes violence, discrimination, or hate speech
terms.s6li5: Contains spam, scams, or fraudulent content
terms.s6li6: Violates privacy or data protection laws
terms.s7text: The Service is provided "as is" without any representations or warranties, express or implied. We make no representations or warranties in relation to the Service or the information and materials provided on the Service.
terms.s7text2: We do not warrant that the Service will be constantly available, uninterrupted, or free from errors or defects. We are not responsible for the content of external websites linked through our Service.
terms.s8text: In no event shall we or our suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the Service.
terms.s9text: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs the Service and informs users of our data collection practices.
terms.s10text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new Terms of Service on this page. Your continued use of the Service after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s11text: We may terminate or suspend your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
terms.s12text: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.s13text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through our website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.translationNotice: English version is the authoritative text. Translations are for reference only.
privacy.s1text: We ("we", "our", or "us") are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit MossGame and use our services.
privacy.s1text2: Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with its terms, please do not access the site.
privacy.s2aText: We may collect information that you voluntarily provide when you:
privacy.s2aLi1: Submit a website or resource to our directory
privacy.s2aLi4: Participate in user surveys or feedback
privacy.s2aInc3: Any other information you choose to provide
privacy.s2bText: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect certain information about your device:
privacy.s2cText: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.
privacy.s3text: We use the information we collect for various purposes:
privacy.s3li1: Provide, operate, and maintain our website and services
privacy.s3li3: Improve, personalize, and expand our services
privacy.s3li4: Understand and analyze how you use our website
privacy.s3li5: Communicate with you, including for customer service
privacy.s3li6: Send you updates and newsletters (with your consent)
privacy.s3li7: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues and security threats
privacy.s4text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information:
privacy.s4li1: Information you submit will be publicly displayed on our directory.
privacy.s4li2: We may share with third-party providers (e.g., hosting, analytics).
privacy.s4li3: We may disclose if required by law.
privacy.s4li4: In connection with merger, sale, or asset transfer.
privacy.s5text: We implement appropriate security measures. However, no Internet transmission is 100% secure.
privacy.s6text: We retain information only as long as necessary, unless required by law.
privacy.s7text: Depending on your location, you may have rights:
privacy.s7li4: Object to processing of your data.
privacy.s7text2: To exercise these rights, please contact us.
privacy.s8text: We are not responsible for privacy practices of third-party sites linked from our service.
privacy.s9text: We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.
privacy.s10text: Your data may be transferred internationally. By using our service, you consent.
privacy.s11text: We may update this policy. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.
privacy.s12text: California residents have specific rights under the CCPA.
privacy.s13text: EEA residents have data protection rights under GDPR.
privacy.s14text: If you have questions, please contact us through our website.

badges.title: Attribution Badges
badges.description: Show your support and get dofollow backlinks by displaying MossGame badges on your website
badges.fosReq: If you use MossGame's source code to build your own directory, you must display the "Powered by MossGame" badge
badges.fosVisible: The badge must be visible on your website (typically in the footer or about page)
badges.fosLink: The badge must link back to https://mossgame.com
badges.fosNoModify: Do not remove, modify, or obscure the badge
badges.fosCommercial: Commercial use is allowed with proper attribution
badges.fsOptional: Optional but Recommended: Display the "Featured on MossGame" badge to get a dofollow backlink
badges.fsPriority: Websites with the badge receive higher priority in listings
badges.fsAutoUpgrade: Your link will automatically change from nofollow to dofollow when badge is verified
badges.fsReferral: The badge helps drive referral traffic to your site
badges.benefitDofollowDesc: Get valuable SEO juice with dofollow backlinks that help improve your search rankings
badges.benefitPromotionDesc: List your game development tools on MossGame completely free - no hidden costs or subscription fees
badges.benefitSupportDesc: Help support an open source project and contribute to the game developer community
badges.chooseBadgeDesc: Select the badge that best matches your website's design
badges.impl1: Choose a badge that matches your website theme
badges.impl2: Copy the HTML or Markdown code
badges.impl3: Paste it in your website footer or about page
badges.impl4: Our system will automatically verify the badge within 24 hours
badges.impl5: Once verified, your link will be upgraded to dofollow
badges.implOs1: If you're using MossGame source code, attribution is mandatory
badges.implOs2: Add the "Powered by MossGame" badge to your website
badges.implOs3: Place it in a visible location (footer recommended)
badges.implOs4: Ensure the badge links to https://mossgame.com
badges.implOs5: You may use the code for commercial purposes with attribution
badges.faqRequired: Do I have to display the badge?
badges.faqRequiredAnswer: If you're using MossGame's source code: Yes, it's required. If you've just submitted your website: No, but displaying the badge gets you a dofollow backlink.
badges.faqCustomizeAnswer: You can choose between light and dark themes, but please don't modify the badge design. The badge must remain recognizable and link to MossGame.
badges.faqVerifyAnswer: Our automated system checks for badges every 24 hours. Once verified, your link status will be updated automatically.
badges.faqRemove: What if I remove the badge?
badges.faqRemoveAnswer: For open source users: This violates the terms of service. For submitted websites: Your link will be changed back to nofollow.
badges.upstreamNote: Note: MossGame is derived from the HiCyou open-source project. If your project also uses HiCyou source code, the HiCyou Attribution License requires you to display the original "Powered by Hi Cyou" badge as well.

friendlyLinks.title: Friendly Links
friendlyLinks.description: Our friends and partner sites — great projects from the community.
friendlyLinks.empty: No friendly links yet. Check back soon!
friendlyLinks.exchangeNote: Interested in exchanging links? Contact us through our website.

backlinkDatabase.title: Backlink Resource Database
backlinkDatabase.description: Curated list of game development and tech platforms where you can submit your tool to get backlinks. Filter by DR score, dofollow/nofollow.
backlinkDatabase.name: Site
backlinkDatabase.faqWhatDesc: A curated list of platforms where you can submit your website to get backlinks. Includes DR (Domain Rating) scores to help you prioritize high-value opportunities.
backlinkDatabase.faqDrDesc: DR (Domain Rating) measures a website's overall backlink authority. Higher DR = more SEO value from a backlink. Prioritize high-DR dofollow links first.
backlinkDatabase.faqDofollowDesc: Dofollow links pass SEO authority to your site. Nofollow links don't pass authority but still bring traffic and brand exposure. Both have value.
backlinkDatabase.faqPriorityDesc: Start with high-DR dofollow platforms, then expand to niche/community sites relevant to your tool. Keep your backlink profile diverse and natural.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: MossGame is a free, open-source game development tools directory. Fork it, customize it, build your own.
openSource.whatDesc1: Use MossGame for personal or commercial projects — completely free.
openSource.whatDesc2: Modify, customize, and extend to fit your needs. Create your own game dev tool directory.
openSource.whatDesc3: Deploy to any hosting platform. All you need is Node.js and MySQL.
openSource.licenseDesc1: MossGame is based on the HiCyou open-source project and inherits its attribution license.
openSource.licenseDesc2: You must display the original "Powered by Hi Cyou" badge on your site footer or about page.
openSource.licenseDesc3: This helps support the open-source ecosystem and the original project maintainers.
